about.subtitle: History, mission, and values of Mongolian Railway

history.title: Our History
history.description: Mongolian Railway JSC has been a leader in Mongolia's transportation sector since 1949. We have served as the backbone of national development, providing reliable transportation services for decades.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To support Mongolia's economic development by providing safe, reliable, and accessible railway transportation services.
